ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KERN CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KERN CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS AGAINST ANTHONY R. LOPEZ A/K/A ANTHONY R. LOPEZ, JR IS CONTINUED TO 03/25/2010 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KERN CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS AGAINST ANTHONY R. LOPEZ A/K/A ANTHONY R. LOPEZ, JR., GIVEN THAT PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THERE WAS NO FACTUAL BASIS FOR THE COMPLAINT, FAILED TO DISMISS WITHIN THE SAFE HARBOR PERIOD, AND HAS NOT ADDRESSED DEFENDANT'S SHOWING OF A VIOLATION OF 128.7 (B), THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND PLAINTIFF AND MR. LOPEZ IN HIS CAPACITY AS ATTORNEY JOINTLY & SEVERALLY IS ORDERED TO PAY SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500 WHICH THE COURT DEEMS ADEQUATE UNDER 128.7 (D). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

ATTY. MIRIAM HISER, TEL. NO. 345-9243 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KERN CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S Motion For Imposition Of Sanctions Against Anthony R. Lopez A/K/A Anthony R. Lopez, Jr., GIVEN THAT PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THERE WAS NO FACTUAL BASIS FOR THE COMPLAINT, FAILED TO DISMISS WITHIN THE SAFE HARBOR PERIOD, AND HAS NOT ADDRESSED DEFENDANT'S SHOWING OF A VIOLATION OF 128.7 (B), THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND PLAINTIFF AND MR. LOPEZ IN HIS CAPACITY AS ATTORNEY JOINTLY & SEVERALLY IS ORDERED TO PAY SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500 WHICH THE COURT DEEMS ADEQUATE UNDER 128.7 (d). Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
